description: A clickable action element for triggering user actions. Use for primary CTAs, form submissions, and any discrete user action.
instructions: Use variant to set intent (default, positive, negative, danger, loud) and emphasis to set visual weight (strong=filled, default=outlined, weak=ghost). Use aspect='square' with icon-only buttons and always provide a title or aria-label for accessibility. Use rounding='full' for circular icon buttons. Use SplitButton when a primary action needs a secondary dropdown menu.
name: Button
